arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Lille-Real Madrid: Kylian Mbappe one of two big injury returns tipped to start
arts.sum: Real Madrid face Lille in their first Champions League away game of the season on Wednesday night, as they are hosted at the Stade Pierre Mauroy for the first time ever. arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé wasn’t expected to play any part at all in Real Madrid’s UEFA Champions League encounter against Lille OSC. While he has made the trip to northern France with…

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro gave Real Madrid two reasons for joining Manchester United instead
arts.sum: Real Madrid will face Lille this evening in the Champions League, with whom they were locked in negotiations during the summer. Unusually for Real Madrid though, they did not get their man, as Leny Yoro moved to Manchester United for a fee of €62m. Los Blancos were in talks with Lille for some time, having […] The post Leny Yoro gave Real Madrid two reasons for joining Manchester United instead appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Lille vs Real Madrid, 2024 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Lille in what will be the first away game of the 2024-25 edition of the Champions League for Los Blancos. Real Madrid predicted XI: Lunin, Carvajal, Tchouameni, Rudiger, Mendy, Camavinga, Valverde, Bellingham, Güler, Rodrygo, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Martin Odegaard return hint dropped amid Real Madrid transfer battle
arts.sum: Arsenal are gearing up for Saturday's clash against Southampton as the fallout from their Champions League game against PSG continues following Tuesday night's match

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Lille
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe, who missed Sunday's draw, has travelled to France with the rest of the Madrid squad, and here's the team Ancelotti could pick on Wednesday night. Ancelotti will get another chance to assess the progress of his squad on Wednesday as Madrid take on Lille away from home in their second league phase encounter.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting XI against Lille in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: The most probable starting XI for Real Madrid at the Pierre Mauroy Stadium is: Lunin; Carvajal, Tchouaméni or Militão, Rüdiger, Mendy; Valverde, Camavinga, Bellingham; Güler; Rodrygo, and Vinicius. Will Mbappé play for Real Madrid against Lille?

arts.ttl: Not Arsenal! 'Florian Wirtz will sign for Real Madrid'
arts.sum: Florian Wirtz will sign for Real Madrid, according to ex- Bayern Munich director Michael Reschke. "Bayern Munich is one of the top-five clubs in Europe.
